name: SPM-enriched Marine Oil
summary: Oral marine-oil supplement formulations enriched for specialized pro-resolving mediator pathway metabolites or precursors, including products studied as SPM Active or SPM Emulsion.
mechanism_summary: Aims to raise circulating SPMs or SPM-pathway metabolites and shift leukocyte or macrophage phenotypes toward pro-resolution activity.

open_questions: Whether increased circulating SPMs translate into improved tissue repair or aging-relevant function
Which formulation, dose, and metabolite profile is clinically meaningful
Whether effects are reproducible in older adults with repair deficits rather than young healthy volunteers or disease-specific cohorts
